title: human HCC sample from elder patient [HCC_330T.CEL]
source_name_ch1: human HCC sample from elder patient
treatment_protocol_ch1: Fresh HCC tissues and non-tumor counter parts that had been removed during surgery were snap frozen and kept in liquid nitrogen for RNA extraction.
growth_protocol_ch1: The HCC samples used in this study were the original tumors obtained from the first operations of patients.
extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was extracted by Trizol according to the manufacturer's instructions.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared according to the standard Affymetrix protocol.
hyb_protocol: cRNA were hybridized, washed and stained on U133 plus 2.0 chips according to standard Affymetrix protocol.
scan_protocol: Chips are stained on Affymetrix GCS3000 scanner (scanner type M10)
data_processing: The CEL file was loaded to R/Bioconductor software and normalized by GC-RMA with default settings.
